details.reasoning: All rubric requirements met: ImageTextToTextPipeline class created with async _call method accepting images and text prompt; uses AutoModelForImageTextToText imported at top; calls model.generate() to produce output; processor handles pixel_values extraction from images; returns objects with generated_text property; properly registered in SUPPORTED_TASKS with 'multimodal' type; comprehensive JSDoc with @typedef ImageTextToTextSingle and callback definition including example usage; follows existing pipeline patterns (batching, tokenizer.batch_decode, etc.); no modifications to existing classes; documentation updated with new task in comments. Implementation is clean, well-structured, and consistent with existing codebase patterns.
